name_en: 📣📣📣 [Full Counter Packaging] 🔥🔥 Gucci Ophidia Bucket Bag Medium. The medium Ophidia bucket bag is a sales hit. Unlike the mini version, this design adds a top handle for portability while retaining the classic drawstring. The capacity is significantly increased, making it very practical. Highly recommended!! Model 550621 Dimensions 20.5*26*11cm
